rationale.R1.3: The revised text provides a detailed and structured evaluation of the RLHF-Align model, aligning each claim with the evidence presented.
rationale.RX.1: While the revision flags some limitations in the evaluation, it does not explicitly mark uncertainty for all claims as required by the higher anchor.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: The revision avoids introducing new errors but slightly regresses on providing a full confidence interval and significance testing.
rationale.RX.5: The revisions trace major changes well, though minor edits are not annotated.
